description: Sector overlay for French payment institutions, electronic-money institutions, payment platforms, payment-service providers, crypto-asset service providers, and related digital-finance documentation.

metadata.scope: France-only sector overlay controls for Payment Platforms and Services. Intended to be used with france_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official French/EU legal, regulatory, supervisory, and guidance sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: ACPR banking, payment, and prudential supervision
AMF PSAN/PSCA registration and approval materials

rules.title: Payment or electronic-money authorization evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for payment institution, electronic-money institution, ACPR authorization, agent, distributor, or regulated payment-service evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: PSAN/PSCA registration or crypto-service authorization evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for PSAN/PSCA, AMF registration, crypto-asset custody, exchange, trading platform, or digital-asset service evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: AMF PSAN/PSCA registration and approval materials

rules.title: Payment AML/CFT and customer due-diligence evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for KYC/CDD, beneficial owner, AML/CFT, suspicious transaction, sanctions screening, or TRACFIN evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Payment security, authentication, or fraud-control evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for strong customer authentication, payment security, fraud monitoring, incident management, access control, or encryption evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
